_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition, consumer segmentation, interface design (APIs, subscriptions, files), SLA definition, and data product lifecycle.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Knowledge DQ-K-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.568), DQ-T-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.556). Shared vocabulary: [data]. NICE-only terms [determine, specifications] vs WIDAI-only terms [apis, consumer, definition, design, files, interface] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.838 (P=0.845, R=0.831). Balanced P/R — the 3-word NICE element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Determine data specifications" and "Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 ≈ STS 0.556 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.3%. Shared tokens: [data]. NICE-only: [determine, specifications]. WIDAI-only: [apis, consumer, definition, design, files, interface].
